nodes.name: ⚙️ Map Sequence to Brevo List
nodes.notes: SETUP: (1) Create account at brevo.com — free. (2) Contacts → Lists → Create 4 lists: Welcome, Buyers, Leads, Newsletter. (3) Copy each list ID (shown in URL when editing). (4) API Keys → Generate key → replace YOUR_BREVO_API_KEY.

nodes.name: 🔀 Send Now or Create Automation?
nodes.notes: Newsletter = send immediately. All sequences = create Brevo automation (triggered by list addition).

nodes.name: 📤 Brevo — Send Newsletter Now
nodes.notes: Sends the newsletter campaign immediately. Brevo respects the 300/day free tier limit automatically.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build Brevo Automation Payload
nodes.notes: Builds a Brevo automation workflow — triggers when a contact is added to the designated list, then sends each email with the configured delay.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Brevo — Create Automation Workflow
nodes.notes: Creates the drip automation in Brevo. Once created, it runs automatically whenever a contact is added to the trigger list. Only needs to run ONCE per sequence type — subsequent triggers just add contacts to the list.

nodes.name: 🔀 Add Contact Immediately?
nodes.notes: If a specific contact email was included (post-purchase trigger from WF03), add them to the sequence list immediately so their drip starts now.

nodes.name: 👤 Brevo — Add Contact to Sequence
nodes.notes: Adds a specific contact to the trigger list, which starts their drip sequence immediately. Called after purchases (from WF03) and after ManyChat email capture.

meta.description: WF11B: Brevo Automation Builder. Creates drip sequences as Brevo automations (trigger: contact added to list). Newsletters sent immediately as campaigns. Adds specific contacts on post-purchase or ManyChat capture. Free tier covers 300 emails/day.
